description_long: This object is a small, bushy tree with a dense, rounded canopy composed of overlapping, broad green leaves. The leaves are arranged in multiple layers, giving the tree a lush and full appearance, with some leaves showing subtle yellow-green highlights along the edges and veins. The overall shape is dome-like, with the foliage extending outward and downward, nearly touching the ground on all sides. There is no visible trunk or branches, as the foliage completely covers the lower portion of the tree. The leaf texture appears matte and slightly rough, with a natural, organic pattern. This type of tree is commonly found in urban parks, gardens, or as decorative landscaping along sidewalks and streets.
description: A dense, dome-shaped tree with overlapping broad green leaves and no visible trunk, resembling a lush ornamental shrub.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded, layered canopy with leaves fanning outward and downward, creating a full, bushy appearance.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the dense layering of leaves and the slightly asymmetrical spread of the foliage.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the compact, overlapping leaves and the dome-like shape, with foliage nearly touching the ground.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the thick, cascading leaf arrangement and the overall fullness of the canopy.
